About
MeBuilding something real.

Filipino-Chinese, born in the Philippines, currently based in Melbourne. Studying Business and Technology at RMIT University while competing in basketball and exploring the intersection of sport, creativity, and technology.

Open to opportunities across business, tech, and creative industries. This site itself started as a small experiment — built entirely through conversational AI to explore the capabilities of Claude and vibe coding. What began as a personal archive became a full personal platform.

The chapters that made Brent, Brent.

2005
Born in Manila
Filipino-Chinese. Oldest of the kids. The lore begins.
2011–2022
Xavier School
Formative years in Manila. Where the basketball obsession started and the character was built.
2023
Moved to Australia
Packed up and moved to Melbourne solo. New city, new chapter, same energy.
2024
Diploma of Business
Finished BSB50120 Diploma of Business at RMIT. First qualification on Australian soil.
2025
MBA Premiers 🏆
Won the Melbourne Basketball Association championship with The NDA's.
2026
Bachelor's Degree
Finishing Bachelor of Business at RMIT University. The grind pays off.

About Brent

Filipino-Chinese, born in the Philippines and currently based in Melbourne, Australia. Studying Business and Technology at RMIT University while competing in basketball and exploring the crossover between sport, creativity, and technology.

Open to opportunities across business, tech, and creative industries. Always looking to connect with people building interesting things.

This site started as a small personal project — built entirely through conversational AI to test the capabilities of Claude and vibe coding. It evolved from a simple archive into a full personal platform. Still building.
